description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a before_script on every job installing clang via apt, installing Rust via curl to rustup, sourcing Cargo, printing Ruby version, configuring Bundler with zipruby flags, installing gems with bundle install --jobs=$(nproc) --path=deps and cleaning, then defines a test job in the test stage that uses a matrix of RUBY_VERSION values 3.1,3.2,3.3,3.4 with the ruby:$RUBY_VERSION image, caches the deps directory under key ruby:$RUBY_VERSION, skips execution on tags, and runs three commands: bundle exec rake test XML_BACKEND=REXML 2>/dev/null, bundle exec rake test XML_BACKEND=Oga 2>/dev/null, and bundle exec rake test XML_BACKEND=Nokogiri 2>/dev/null. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs only on the master branch, uses the ruby:3.4 image, depends on the test job, caches deps with key ruby:3.4, executes bundle exec rake test:test doc:yard, moves the generated doc and coverage directories into a public folder, and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
